scripts.test:smoke: pnpm build && K6_WEB_DASHBOARD=true K6_WEB_DASHBOARD_EXPORT=dist/report-smoke.html k6 run --out json=dist/report-smoke.json dist/smoke.js
scripts.test:load: pnpm build && K6_WEB_DASHBOARD=true K6_WEB_DASHBOARD_EXPORT=dist/report-load.html k6 run --out json=dist/report-load.json dist/load.js
scripts.test:stress: pnpm build && K6_WEB_DASHBOARD=true K6_WEB_DASHBOARD_EXPORT=dist/report-stress.html k6 run --out json=dist/report-stress.json dist/stress.js
